adultAltarText: An awakening voice from the Sacred&Realm will call those destined to be&Sages, who dwell in the five temples.^$8the Market...^$3Lon Lon Ranch...^$4Zora's Domain...^$5Kakariko Village...^$6Gerudo's Fortress...^$7Spirit Temple...^$lThe awakened ones will await&for the Hero to collect&8 Spiritual Stones and Medallions.^$bAnd the %revil one%w's key will&be hidden somewhere %rinside&its castle%w.^$kTogether with the Hero of Time,&the awakened ones will return&the light of peace to the world...
childAltarText: 3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule...^$0Death Mountain Crater...^$1Death Mountain Trail...^$2Deku Tree...^$cYe who may become a Hero...&Stand with the Ocarina and&play the Song of Time.
dampeText: Whoever reads this, please enter&%gKakariko Village%w. I will let&you have my stretching, shrinking&keepsake.^I'm waiting for you.&--Dampé
ganonHintText: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me&by reflecting my lightning bolts&and unleashing the arrows from&Gerudo's Fortress!
ganonText: I knew I shouldn't have put the&key on the other side of my door.

hints.Colossus Gossip Stone: They say that a Big Poe Bottle&can be found at Death Mountain&Crater.
hints.DMC Gossip Stone: They say that Phantom Ganon&holds Bombs (5 pieces).
hints.DMC Upper Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Shadow Temple&hoards a Strength Upgrade.
hints.DMT Gossip Stone: They say that the Biggoron Sword&can be found at Kokiri Forest.
hints.DMT Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Fire Temple hoards&the Prelude of Light.
hints.Dodongo's Cavern Gossip Stone: They say that the Lizalfos in&Dodongo's Cavern like to play in&lava.
hints.Fairy Gossip Stone: They say that plundering Zora's&Fountain is a foolish choice.
hints.GC Maze Gossip Stone: They say that the Mask of Truth&yields a Piece of Heart.
hints.GC Medigoron Gossip Stone: They say that the Light Trial&was dispelled by Sheik.
hints.GV Gossip Stone: They say that a hero ventures&beyond the wasteland to learn a&Wallet.
hints.GY Gossip Stone: They say that the Zora Sapphire&can be found at Deku Tree.
hints.HC Malon Gossip Stone: They say that the final reward&from the Frogs of Zora's River&is a Piece of Heart.
hints.HC Rock Wall Gossip Stone: They say there was a second&spitter.
hints.HC Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that plundering&Jabu-Jabu's Belly is a foolish&choice.
hints.HF Cow Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Gerudo's Fortress&is on the way of the hero.
hints.HF Near Market Gossip Stone: They say that Spirit Temple&hoards the Requiem of Spirit.
hints.HF Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Shadow Temple&hoards Deku Seeds (30 pieces).
hints.HF Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that the Fire Medallion&can be found at Zora's Domain.
hints.Jabu Gossip Stone: They say that a Huge Rupee can&be found at Kokiri Forest.
hints.KF Deku Tree Left Gossip Stone: They say that Dodongo's Cavern&hoards a Recovery Heart.
hints.KF Deku Tree Right Gossip Stone: They say ZAPD is good software.
hints.KF Gossip Stone: They say that the test of&radiance holds a Zora Tunic.
hints.KF Storms Gossip Stone: They say that a Red Rupee can be&found at Hyrule Field.
hints.Kak Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 30 Gold&Skulltulas reveals Deku Nut&Capacity.
hints.LH Lab Gossip Stone: They say that deep in the&forest, Saria teaches a&Slingshot.
hints.LH Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at Lake Hylia.
hints.LH Southwest Gossip Stone: They say that you're wasting time&reading this hint, but I disagree.&Talk to me again!
hints.LW Gossip Stone: They say that Forest Temple is&on the way of the hero.
hints.LW Near Shortcuts Gossip Stone: They say that plundering Temple&of Time is a foolish choice.
hints.SFM Maze Lower Gossip Stone: They say that a hole in a field&near a drawbridge holds a&Recovery Heart.
hints.SFM Maze Upper Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 40 Gold&Skulltulas reveals Epona's&Song.
hints.SFM Saria Gossip Stone: They say that Inside Ganon's&Castle hoards Arrows (30&pieces).
hints.ToT Left Center Gossip Stone: They say that the Water&Medallion can be found at&Kakariko Village.
hints.ToT Left Gossip Stone: They say that the Fire Trial was&dispelled by Sheik.
hints.ToT Right Center Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 50 Gold&Skulltulas reveals the Song of&Storms.
hints.ToT Right Gossip Stone: They say that Death Mountain&Crater is on the way of the hero.
hints.ZD Gossip Stone: They say that catching Big Poes&leads to a Heart Container.
hints.ZR Near Domain Gossip Stone: They say that the Flare Dancer&atop the Fire Temple guards a&chest containing Deku Nuts (10&pieces).
hints.ZR Near Grottos Gossip Stone: They say that the Graveyard is&on the way of the hero.
hints.ZR Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Bombs (10 pieces)&can be found at the Market.

locations.Bottom of the Well Compass Chest: Bottom of the Well Small Key
locations.Bottom of the Well Freestanding Key: Bottom of the Well Small Key
locations.Bottom of the Well Underwater Left Chest: Bottom of the Well Small Key
